generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former national security advisor, I've seen firsthand how vital our alliances are for maintaining peace. While some argue we should go it alone, the reality is that shared burden in NATO keeps us all safer. Remember, our grandparents built this system after WWII - we owe it to them to uphold it. #StrongerTogether #NationalSecurity
